_comment: Test examples for lookupShoppingItemByName. Each example lists the saved rows and the exact answer we expect. The old local database and Supabase must give the same answer.

input.request: The name the caller asks for.

schema.expected: The exact answer we expect back.

fixtures.name: 01-blank-name
fixtures.description: Blank names do not match anything.

fixtures.name: 03-direct-name-match
fixtures.description: A saved item name can match directly.

fixtures.name: 04-case-and-outer-spaces-ignored
fixtures.description: Name matching ignores case and outer spaces.

fixtures.name: 05-synonym-match
fixtures.description: A synonym can match and return its shopping item.

fixtures.name: 06-direct-match-wins-over-synonym
fixtures.description: Direct item names are checked before synonyms.

fixtures.name: 07-lowest-item-id-wins
fixtures.description: Duplicate direct matches return the lowest item id.
